enrichment method: enrichment of ubiquitinated material from cell lysates by metal affinity chromatography
fragmentation method: analyzed on a Q Exactive HFx instrument in positive polarity mode with the following additional settings: MS1: 60k resolution; AGC target: 2e5; MaxIT: 50 ms; MS2: Top20; 15k resolution; AGC target: 2e5; nCE = 26.
instrument: analyzed on a Q Exactive HFx instrument
labeling: performed proteomics experiments using SILAC technology
